rationale: Educ. Code §45.034 governs pledging facility revenues for bond payments. It does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict exists.
quote: The board, city council or commission, or commissioners court may pledge all or any part of any of its revenues from the facilities to the payment of any bonds issued under this subchapter
_note: Rule text concerns facility revenue bonds only; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
